## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss priorities and strategies for improving AI models, product releases, and integration after the acquisition of Poist.](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to continuously improve AI models and release updates more frequently to stay ahead of competition](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Leverage automation and active learning to enable weekly model improvements](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Share examples of internal automation/AI usage to inspire others](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [Prioritize getting the Poist website announcement done quickly](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Align on technical details/stack for Poist website to enable tracking and integration](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

## Topics

### Improving AI Models and Product Releases

  - [Concern that competitors like OpenAI are rapidly improving expressiveness of voice models while our voices haven't seen noticeable improvements](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [Need a roadmap to show continuous weekly improvements to models to meet rising customer expectations](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=464.0)
  - [Explore using active learning to enable incremental model improvements between major releases](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Share examples internally of how teams are automating workflows with AI to inspire others](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)

### Poist Acquisition Integration

  - [Prioritize getting the Poist acquisition announcement on their website done quickly](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Understand Poist tech stack (CMS, analytics, marketing tools) to enable proper tracking/integration](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Meet with Poist engineer Gene to get context on website architecture and processes](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to prioritize Poist website announcement for next week](https://fathom.video/share/KsvWvxCL_E3Y5KYbzSpMYJjSpC9U6sYM?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
